productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Girls Party Frock Lavender Dress
description: Composition Lavender round neck frock made of blended fabric with netting, has a cotton lining, netted cap sleeves, satin floral and stone embellishments on the waist, purple satin belt, zipper at the back and a hairband with stone embellishments Fit Reuglar Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Warm iron Every mother loves to dress up her bundle of joy as a little princess. This frock from doodle will make your little one look like a miniature version of princesses in the fairy tales you read her to sleep. Pair it with sandals from crocs and a cute hairband that comes with this frock.
